diagnosis: `investment_queries.txt` is too broad/generic, so runs miss macro regime, valuation stress, and asymmetry-specific signal terms.
`prompt_lre_investment_finder.sh` hardcodes `google-news` for all queries, which hurts background retrieval and increases low-value Google News navigation opens.
Run health checks are brittle: zero-byte `query-*.json` files can still produce `weak_signal=false` because screenshot count masks extraction failure.
Fallback detection checks only the primary run folder (`$run_path`) and can miss valid `-fallback` outputs, causing unnecessary fallback2 retries.
`prompt_lre_self_evolve.sh` validation expects `analysis` instead of schema field `diagnosis`, so self-evolve results can fail validation/apply despite valid output.
query_strategy_updates: Adopt 3 intent buckets in query files: `news|`, `general|`, `scholar|` (scholar max 1/8 queries, only for technical claims).
Use a keyword frame per theme: `macro driver + transmission channel + investable proxy + risk/valuation term` (example transmission channels: power, credit, supply chain, regulation).
Append source and anti-noise operators for high-signal retrieval on key queries: `Reuters OR FT OR WSJ OR company filing -site:news.google.com -site:google.com`.
Force at least one disconfirming-risk query per theme (e.g., demand slowdown, margin compression, policy reversal) and one monitor-trigger query (monthly KPI/threshold).
Set engine mix target per run: ~50% `google-news` (timely), ~40% `google` (background/filings), ~10% `google-scholar` (only evidence-heavy technical edges).
prompt_patch: Patch `lab_prompt_tools/lre/lre_self_evolve_investments_prompt.md`: require explicit output sections for `engine_routing_plan`, `source_tier_policy`, `risk_monitor_signals`, and `split_decision` (yes/no + why).
Patch `lab_prompt_tools/lre/lre_investments_prompt.md`: require each high-conviction idea to include at least 1 disconfirming signal and 2 measurable monthly monitoring triggers (numeric or binary).
Patch `lab_prompt_tools/lre/investment_queries.txt` format to support prefixed lines (`news|...`, `general|...`, `scholar|...`) and seed with balanced macro/valuation/asymmetry templates.
script_patch: Fix validation mismatch in `lab_prompt_tools/lre/prompt_lre_self_evolve.sh`: replace required field `analysis` with `diagnosis` to match schema.
Patch `lab_prompt_tools/lre/prompt_lre_investment_finder.sh`: add `choose_engine()` (reuse logic pattern from ideas/profile scripts) and route by query prefix/token instead of always `google-news`.
Patch `prompt_lre_investment_finder.sh` fallback detection: check `query-*.json` across `${run_label}`, `${run_label}-fallback`, and `${run_label}-fallback2` before deciding additional retries.
Patch stats block in `prompt_lre_investment_finder.sh`: treat zero-byte/invalid JSON as failure; compute `weak_signal` from parseable JSON ratio + valid opened items, not screenshot count alone.

Add URL-quality filter post-run (new helper script, e.g. `lab_prompt_tools/lre/prompt_lre_investment_source_filter.py`): flag/penalize hosts like `news.google.com`, `google.com/*`; trigger auto-rerun with `google` + source operators when low-quality host ratio >40%.

Split workflow into focused tools (recommended: yes): create `prompt_lre_investment_news_collector.sh`, `prompt_lre_investment_risk_checker.sh`, and `prompt_lre_investment_thesis_monitor.sh`, then aggregate outputs in `prompt_lre_investment_finder.sh`.
recommended_queries: hyperscaler capex guidance 2026 datacenter ROI microsoft alphabet amazon earnings call
AI inference demand power constraint utility interconnection queue data center 2026 Reuters
semiconductor equipment book-to-bill memory cycle risk 2026 ASML TSMC Samsung guidance
software valuation dispersion rule of 40 free cash flow yield compression 2026
credit spreads MOVE index dollar liquidity regime shift equity drawdown risk 2026
small cap cybersecurity platform consolidation asymmetric upside insider buying 2026
next_experiment: Implement 4 low-risk fixes first (`diagnosis` validator key, engine routing, fallback path detection, weak-signal scoring), run one investment cycle, and pass only if: parseable JSON ratio >= 70%, low-quality host ratio <= 40%, and each high-conviction output includes >=2 monthly monitor triggers; then roll out the 3-tool split.
